name: Linguine "Deliziose
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Salmon, filet, fresh, deveined and julienne coarsely
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil linguine according to the package instructions or make it fresh. Cool under cold running water and set aside.
2. Lightly flour the prawns and salmon.
3. In a large saute pan, heat the olive oil over high heat. Add the prawns and salmon and saute for 1 minute.
4. Add leeks (one at a time) and mushrooms, sauteing for 1 minute after each addition.
5. Add wine, marjoram, parsley, garlic, salt, pepper, and butter. Saute lightly for 1 minute.
6. Stir in broth, lower heat, and simmer for 2 minutes, adding more broth if the mixture becomes too dry.
7. Add the drained linguine and mix well. Simmer for 1 minute.
8. To serve, place linguine on a plate first, arrange prawns on top, then pour remaining sauce over both. Garnish with parsley.
